title: Steve Hilton Wins Second Spot in California Governor Race, Beating Tom Steyer
summary: Steve Hilton, a Republican endorsed by President Trump, will face Xavier Becerra, a Democrat, in the general election. Tom Steyer, another Democrat, will not advance.

title: Sanders-Backed Progressive Advances in California Swing District Against Valadao
summary: Randy Villegas will face the incumbent, David Valadao, a Republican who has survived numerous challenges in a competitive district.

title: Rep. Kevin Kiley, Independent, to Face Richard Pan in California House Race
summary: Mr. Kiley dropped his Republican affiliation earlier this year. The newly drawn Sixth Congressional District is widely considered to be favorable for Democrats.

title: Takeaways From Tuesday’s Primary Elections in Maine and South Carolina
summary: Graham Platner won the Democratic primary for Senate in Maine and quickly turned his populist message against Susan Collins, the Republican incumbent.

title: Lindsey Graham Wins Republican Senate Primary in South Carolina
summary: Mr. Graham, a four-term incumbent, is the favorite to win the general election in a solidly Republican state.

title: Nevada Attorney General Wins Democratic Nomination for Governor
summary: Aaron Ford easily outpaced a Washoe County commissioner, Alexis Hill, for the nod to take on Gov. Joe Lombardo in November.

title: Navy Admiral Fired by Hegseth Advances to Runoff to Replace Mace
summary: Nancy Lacore would face a tough fall election in a district drawn in 2021 to be more Republican. She is seeking to replace Representative Nancy Mace, who ran unsuccessfully for governor instead of running for re-election.

title: Blanche Was Once Seen as Tempering Trump’s Tactics. Now He’s All In.
summary: The ascendancy of Todd Blanche shows how the practices that were initially deemed out of bounds even in President Trump’s Justice Department seem to be the order of the day.

title: House Passes G.O.P.’s $70 Billion Immigration Bill
summary: The vote gave final passage to Republicans’ megabill to fund immigration enforcement through the remainder of President Trump’s term, clearing it for his signature.

title: House defies Johnson and passes Democratic-led labor bill
summary: Twenty G.O.P lawmakers broke with Speaker Mike Johnson and joined Democrats in backing a bill to amend the National Labor Relations Act.

title: Hannah Neeleman’s Ballerina Farm Store Draws Crowds in Utah
summary: Tourists are flocking to Midway, Utah. The Ballerina Farm Store, from the influencer whose brand revolves around motherhood and farm life, is a reason.

title: Trump’s Sharp Turn on China: Embracing It as a Peer Power
summary: President Trump’s warming with Xi Jinping of China, a leader he admires, has ignited anxieties in Washington and across Asia.

title: In the Hybrid A.I.-Human Work Force, Who Will Actually Thrive?
summary: A panel of experts explains how job seekers should prepare for the future of work.

title: Anthropic Releases ‘Safe’ Version of Its Mythos A.I. Technology
summary: Called Claude Fable 5, it is twice as expensive as the company’s previous flagship system.

title: Meta A.I. Bug Allowed Hackers to Take Over Instagram Accounts
summary: The flaw, which Meta said it had fixed, allowed anyone to take over accounts using a bug in the company’s new artificial intelligence software.

title: Meet the NASA Astronauts in the Artemis III 4-Person Crew
summary: NASA’s next mission in its effort to return humans to the moon will be led by an all-male crew. Three of them have extensive experience in space, while the other was a backup on Artemis II.

title: Can NASA Really Land Astronauts on the Moon by 2028?
summary: Experts have been hopeful, but say the agency’s lunar aspirations are largely at the whims of two billionaires, Elon Musk and Jeff Bezos.

title: Paramount CEO David Ellison Pledges Editorial Independence for ‘60 Minutes’
summary: David Ellison told Ms. Stahl, one of three remaining correspondents for the news program, that he would respect the show’s editorial decisions after a tumultuous stretch.

title: How Talking to the ‘Chat’ Crossed Over Into Real Life
summary: It’s a word ripped from Twitch streams, but it functions as a Greek chorus for an online, isolated generation.

title: F.D.A. Clears Sunscreen Ingredient Long Used in Europe and Asia
summary: Dermatologists say bemotrizinol offers advantages over other compounds in sunscreens currently on the market.

title: Taking a Week to Count Votes Is Doing It Wrong
summary: It is time for California to catch up to its own past.

title: ‘A Mighty Form of Communion’: Three Writers on the World Cup’s Strange Magic
summary: There’s ample cause for celebration and consternation alike.

title: Air Canada Pilot Accused of Flying for 17 Years Without Proper License
summary: The pilot, who retired last year before the investigation, held some valid flight credentials, officials said, but not the one required to be a captain.
